constraints_1_content: After creating /app/solution.sh, run it immediately with `APP_ROOT=/app bash /app/solution.sh` and inspect the terminal output for errors before checking the CSV contents; never mark task_complete without at least one successful end-to-end run.
constraints_1_rationale: Specific to Terminus2Agent's tmux execution loop and this particular script-under-test; validates runtime behavior before declaring completion.
constraints_2_content: After the script finishes running, verify both output files have the correct headers by executing `head -1 /app/out/conflicts.csv` and `head -1 /app/out/dependency_graph.csv` in the terminal and visually confirming the column names match the specification exactly.
constraints_2_rationale: Uses tmux shell inspection specific to this task's output paths; guards against subtle header typos that would fail strict assertions.
constraints_4_content: Do not use `python2` or `/usr/bin/env python`; always invoke `python3` explicitly so that `tomllib` (stdlib in Python 3.11+) and f-strings are available without compatibility shims.
constraints_4_rationale: Task-domain specific (TOML parsing requires python3.11+ tomllib); explicit interpreter choice prevents silent fallback to Python 2 on some systems.
